Where to stay in Munich ✨ @louishotelmunich 

A stunning escape right in the heart of Munich filled with beautiful details that make you feel instantly at home🤍 Cosy, design-forward rooms  and a fantastic breakfast with views over the market made our stay extra special🥐☕️

If you’re looking for a comfortable and stylish place while exploring Munich during Christmas , Louis Hotel is a perfect find!

📍 LOUIS Hotel, Viktualienmarkt 6, 80331 Munich
